Interface IServerObjectAdmin7

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Server
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Server.dll

Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("C6CFC4DF-7928-4EC2-9F34-87EED2BAC0A3")]
public interface IServerObjectAdmin7 : IServerObjectAdmin6, IServerObjectAdmin5, IServerObjectAdmin4, IServerObjectAdmin3, IServerObjectAdmin2, IServerObjectAdmin
